blindspots: **hStream AI platform development timeline** — No public roadmap. This is the offensive AI thesis. If it ships with measurable features, HSTM re-rates from compliance vendor to AI-enabled platform. If cancelled, growth ceiling is 5-7% blended. Monitor via: product announcements, earnings call commentary.

**Epic credentialing module (EpicOps) — CONFIRMED 2027 TARGET.** Epic announced credentialing module within EpicOps ERP suite at 2025 UGM. Source: LinkedIn posts by UGM attendees (not official Epic press release). Same source said Epic "will NOT be the silver bullet." Mitigants: HSTM has 25+ years of primary source verification, HITRUST r2, evidence-based privileging; Epic implementation 12-36 months → production 2029-2030 earliest; Epic covers ~28% inpatient beds; KLAS Best in KLAS 2025 Credentialing = MD-Staff (ASM), not Epic. **This is a long-term structural watch item, not a 2026 risk.** Monitor via: Epic product announcements, KLAS credentialing reports, HSTM management commentary on Q1 2026 call.

**HLX revenue contribution** — Acquired business, limited separate disclosure. If HLX is growing faster than legacy, it supports the platform expansion thesis. Monitor via: segment commentary on earnings calls.

**OBBBA / Medicaid policy impact** — Potential changes to Medicaid funding could affect hospital training budgets. Not quantified. Monitor via: CMS policy announcements, state-level Medicaid enrollment data.

noiseFilter: **Blended revenue growth rate (4.6%)** — Masks CredentialStream +21% and ShiftWizard +31%. Legacy drag is mechanical and diminishing. Always decompose by product line.
**Frist family governance criticism** — CEO is family founder. Known factor. Only matters if governance blocks value-maximizing decisions. Monitor for board independence trends.
**Small-cap liquidity events** — $630M mcap with 4 analysts = thin float. 5-10% daily moves on low volume are noise. Only volume spikes signal institutional interest.
**Q4 earnings beat magnitude** — Q4 beat +12.5% is positive but partially seasonal. Judge earnings quality on annual trends.
